channel.title: Dashboard on Jsonnet-as-a-Service
channel.description: Recent content in Dashboard on Jsonnet-as-a-Service

item.title: Dashboard
item.description:
JaaS publishes a maintained Grafana dashboard for its own operator as a single-layer OCI image at ghcr.io/metio/jaas-dashboard. Render it through JaaS the same way you’d render any snippet — no manual JSON to copy around.

The dashboard opens with an SLO band — reconcile availability against its objective, error budget remaining, reconcile-latency p95 against its objective, and an availability-versus-objective trend — over a band of operator internals that explain any movement: reconciles by reason, evaluation throughput and backpressure, rendered output size, storage sweeps, and the controller-runtime workqueue. The series are the metrics the operator exports.

item.title: Flux Operator (ResourceSet) integration
item.description: Render the same Jsonnet for many clusters or tenants without writing a snippet by hand for each one: let a Flux Operator ResourceSet template a JsonnetSnippet per input, and JaaS renders each instance into its own ExternalArtifact. The ResourceSet supplies the per-instance values through Go template substitution; JaaS does the evaluation. There is no ResourceSet field in the JaaS API — you use the two together: the ResourceSet templates ordinary JsonnetSnippet CRs, which JaaS reconciles like any other. This needs the Flux Operator installed alongside JaaS in the operator mode described under operator mode .
